columns.extraction_plan: The treatment regimen for the experimental arm (SOC + AAP) is reported in the abstract and the methods section. The abstract states "SOC + AAP" is "standard-of-care plus abiraterone acetate + prednisone/prednisolone" and "Standard-of-care (SOC) was androgen deprivation therapy." The methods section further specifies the dosages. Extract "Androgen deprivation therapy (ADT) + abiraterone acetate 1000 mg daily + prednisolone 5 mg daily".
